meaning: n.车辆所载的货物,货车的最低载重量
examples: Wherever he goes, a carload of soldiers goes with him.
Turning out mustard by the carload.
THOMAS DIDONE: "It was an inexperienced, immature driver who felt that he was invincible, driving at night with a carload of kids."
An employee of the cafe recognized him and flagged down a carload of German police trainees.
Sports tailgaters, especially Nascar fans, are coming by the carload to RV dealerships.
